nasb.text: And Jesus answered and spoke to the lawyers and Pharisees, saying, “Is it lawful to heal on the Sabbath, or not?”

esv.text: And Jesus responded to the lawyers and Pharisees, saying, “Is it lawful to heal on the Sabbath, or not?”

cnv.text: 耶穌對律法師和法利賽人說：“在安息日治病，可以不可以呢？”

ccb.text: 耶稣问法利赛人和律法教师：“在安息日可以医病吗？”

csbs.text: 于是耶稣问律法师们和法利赛人，说：“在安息日使人痊愈，可以不可以？”
